title: Fix cart totals so discounts cannot make totals negative
prompt: In the AgentLink eval fixture workspace, fix the cart total bug so discounts cannot make totals negative. Edit only files under fixtures/agent-eval-workspace/work. Run the fixture validation command and report what changed.
successCriteria: The failing discount edge-case test passes.
The fix is localized to the fixture work directory.
The final response reports the validation command and result.
